Paul (Rom. 11:17-24), Nephi (1 1 Ne. 10:12-14; 15:7), and Jacob (Jacob 5) have compared the house of Israel to an olive tree. Jacob recorded in a lengthy allegory, "Thus saith the Lord, I will liken thee, O house of Israel, like unto a tame olive-tree" (Jacob 5:3). Further, the tribe of Judah (Jer. 11:16) and the tribe of Ephraim (Hosea 14:6) are symbolical representations of the olive tree.…
